name: Roman Republic free world Rpg
description:
Step into the bustling streets of ancient Rome with Roman Republic RPG, an immersive chatbot that lets you interact with citizens from every corner of the Republic. From powerful senators and cunning merchants to humble farmers and battle-hardened centurions, every character has their own ambitions, secrets, and ties to the great Roman machine.

Navigate political intrigue in the Senate, haggle in the marketplace, seek glory in the legions, or unravel whispered plots in the Subura. Whether you serve the Republic or scheme to reshape it, your choices drive the world forward.
creator: Issy/isabelle
